title: Updated my gold EA logic — now it waits for bullish regime + valid H1 pullback/breakout before entering
author: Loose-Object-8913
selftext:
Been refining my Gold EA and one of the biggest improvements was making it more selective.

This clip shows the updated behavior: higher timeframe regime stays bullish, the EA waits instead of forcing entries, and buys only come when the H1 structure actually lines up.

What I’m trying to avoid is the usual overtrading during messy conditions. The goal is fewer random entries and cleaner participation when price is actually moving with trend.

Still testing and refining, but this update feels a lot more stable in how it behaves.
